name: Automated average House Rental & Sales info to slack

parameters.content:
## Automated average House Rental & Sales info to Slack

### How it works

1. Triggers on a set schedule and configures a target zipcode for real estate analysis.
2. Queries a Supabase database for existing rental and sales market records to see if updates are needed.
3. Sends a Slack notification with the current status if the existing database records are already up-to-date.
4. Fetches the latest market statistics from the Rentcast API if new data is required.
5. Upserts the freshly fetched rental and sales market data into the Supabase database.
6. Formats the results and sends a final Slack notification summarizing the newly updated market information.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Connect your Supabase account and ensure the required tables for market rentals and sales exist.
- [ ] Configure the Rentcast API credentials in the HTTP Request node.
- [ ] Connect your Slack workspace and specify the target channels in all Slack notification nodes.
- [ ] Adjust the Schedule Trigger to run at your desired reporting frequency.

### Customization

You can easily modify the Edit Fields node to track a different zipcode, or expand the JavaScript nodes to customize the Slack message formatting.

## Trigger and Configure Zipcode

Sets up the scheduled execution and initializes the target zipcode for the workflow.

## Fetch and Evaluate Database Records

Retrieves existing rental and sales records from Supabase, merges the results, and determines if an update is necessary.

## Existing Record Slack Notifications

Processes the existing database records and routes a corresponding status message to Slack.

## Fetch Rentcast Market Data

Sends a GET request to the Rentcast API to retrieve the latest real estate market statistics.

## Upsert Market Statistics

Saves the newly fetched rental and sales market data into Supabase, then aggregates the upsert results.

## Format New Market Data

Uses custom JavaScript to format the aggregated market data and evaluates routing conditions for notifications.

## Market Update Slack Notifications

Dispatches Slack messages to the team summarizing the newly inserted real estate market updates.
